api_key.description: Twenty API key. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY> on REST requests; sourced from environment variables or stdin and never logged.

base_url.description: Twenty API base URL override for tests or self-hosted deployments.

replication_start_date.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound for incremental streams that filter and order by createdAt or updatedAt. Stream wiring is deferred to S3; streams that support server-side createdAt/updatedAt filters will honor it.
